repo.description: A demo app that runs librespot-java on Android

terms.context_snippet: This is a demo application to demonstrate that it is possible to run [librespot-java](https://github.com/librespot-org/librespot-java) on an Android device. The app provides basic functionalities to login and then to play a custom URI, pause/resume, skip next and previous, but a…
